title: European gas falls as warm weather eases concerns of shortages
section_path: European gas falls as warm weather eases concerns of shortages
section_path_text: European gas falls as warm weather eases concerns of shortages
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Sentiment remained weak in commodity markets as concerns over Chinese growth remain elevated. This was offset somewhat by a weaker USD, which helped support investor demand. Image reference: 1666731684581.png | assets/2022-10-26_european-gas-falls-as-warm-weather-eases-concerns-of-shortages_img_1666731684581_aa44067284ed.png
Crude oil remained heavily influenced by broader market trends and shifts in the USD.
